name: Academic/Administrative/Postdoctoral Scholar Employment Opportunities
summary: Each week, Human Resources will inform the campus community about new internal job opportunities. The following is a listing of new UNLV academic/administrative/postdoctoral scholar job openings for the week:

name: KUNV Free Movie Night July 6
summary: 91.5 KUNV, UNLV's radio station, is giving away free tickets to the first Las Vegas screening of Gail Daughtry and The Celebrity Sex Pass on Monday, July 6 at AMC Town Square. Reserve your tickets here .

name: Today at Noon! Money Talks: Getting Your Own Place (Light Lunch Included!)
summary: Still thinking about buying a home but don't know where to start? It’s not too late to join the conversation! Today, June 24, from noon to 1 p.m. , join the Institute for Financial Literacy and Wellness and guest experts from Rebel CU for a casual, no-pressure lunch hour...

name: MacOS Tahoe Upgrade Now Available for IT-Managed Computers
summary: Mac users with IT-managed computers can upgrade to macOS Tahoe now through the UNLV Self Service application. Simply open the UNLV Self Service application and click Install next to MacOS Tahoe. If you don’t see the option, your device may already be running Tahoe, or it may...

name: Small Actions, Big Impact: Helping Preserve Campus Cooling During Summer Heat
summary: Southern Nevada summers place significant demand on our campus building cooling systems. While Facilities Management works year-round to maintain and repair HVAC equipment, extreme temperatures can occasionally push systems to their limits. During these periods, the actions...

name: Alert: Lied Library Closed Today, Virtual Reference Services Available
summary: Lied Library will be closed today (June 18) due to an issue with the air conditioning and excessive heat in the building. Facilities is working on a resolution. Phone and virtual reference services remain available during normal operating hours using the Libraries' Ask Us!...
